title: Language Model Response Laboratory
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Artificial Intelligence
Language Models
AI Literacy
description: Step through a simplified language-model response process from instructions and tokens to context constraints and variable output.

learningObjectives: Explain how instructions, tokens, context limits, and probabilistic selection combine to produce a model response.

pedagogical.teachingStrategy: Predict and step through a worked example
keyQuestions: Which input most strongly shapes the response?
commonMisconceptions: A model retrieves one fixed response or exposes its actual internal probabilities.
assessmentOpportunities: Explain each stage and compare stable meaning with variable wording.
